zh.Stichill, The Scottish Borders, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯斯鐵爾
zh.lifeSummary: Annie McCartney於大約1350年出生在蘇格蘭。她於大約1374年與Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯斯鐵爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Stichill, The Scottish Borders, Scotland: 英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯斯鐵爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Annie McCartney于大约1350年出生在苏格兰。她于大约1374年与Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯斯鐵爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: McCartney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Artaine, ‘son of Artan’, a diminutive of the personal name Art, based on a word meaning ‘bear’. Compare McCartan .

variants.name: McCartan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brendan, Conn.
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Artáin ‘son of Artán’, a diminutive of the personal name Art ‘bear’. This is a chieftain family in County Down.

variants.name: McArtney
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Artaine, ‘son of Artan’. See McCartney .

nameMeanings.name: Annie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

en.lifeSummary: Annie McCartney was born about 1350, in Scotland. She married Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill about 1374, in Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Annie McCartney est née environ 1350, à Écosse. Elle a épousé Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill environ 1374, à Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.Stichill, The Scottish Borders, Scotland: Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Annie McCartney wurde um 1350 in Scotland geboren. Sie hat um 1374 in Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

ja.Stichill, The Scottish Borders, Scotland: イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダーススティトチル
ja.lifeSummary: Annie McCartneyは約1350年にスコットランドで生まれた。約1374年にイギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダーススティトチルでRoger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Annie McCartney(은)는 대략 1350년 스컷랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1374년 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 스티트치에서 Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Annie McCartney родилась около 1350 г. в местности Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill около 1374 г. в местности стичилл, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
